clinical_notes: Patient presents with chest pain and shortness of breath on exertion. HbA1c 11.6%, fasting glucose 318 mg/dL. ECG shows ST-segment depression. LDL 198 mg/dL, HDL 31 mg/dL. Peripheral neuropathy confirmed in both feet. Diabetic foot ulcer present. Troponin mildly elevated. Referred to both cardiology and endocrinology urgently.
